title: cerastium vulgatum var. glandulosum
intro: Cerastium vulgatum var. glandulosum, also known as the glandular mouse-ear chickweed, is a variety of the mouse-ear chickweed plant, which is a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, cuts, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Cerastium vulgatum var. glandulosum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and soothing skin conditions such as eczema and acne. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, and is often used in traditional medicine to support skin health and promote overall well-being.
